outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility with ITM call clustering creating support gravity
outlook.summary: Massive ITM call concentration (675-678) creates structural support below spot. Dealers short calls at these strikes generate hedging flows that stabilize near resonance zones. No visible resistance above 681.44. Market prone to consolidation toward 678 primary magnet.

Multi-expiry presence with moderate OI concentration. Acts as fallback support if primary zone fails.

outlook.summary: Price consolidating above 605 RESONANCE support with 610 as critical CALL WALL resistance. Heavy volume concentration indicates active MM hedging. Break above 610 targets upside continuation; failure at 605 triggers deeper correction.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected; positive GEX in monthly expiries suggests price stability. Dealers long gamma in monthly tenors will suppress large moves. 0DTE shows elevated PCR indicating short-term hedging pressure.
outlook.summary: Spot at 6830.71 trades above all visible strikes (6490-6770 range). Data limitation: only CALL options displayed below spot. MONTHLY_2 shows massive concentration at 6500 (954 OI) and 6600 (79 OI) acting as magnetic support zones. Reverse smirk skew in monthlies confirms bullish structural positioning. 6700 shows volume confluence across WEEKLY tenors. Path of least resistance: consolidation with upside bias, supported by positive monthly GEX. Key risk: incomplete PUT data prevents full downside analysis.

levels.motivazione: WEEKLY_1 (75 vol) + WEEKLY_2 (70 vol) show consistent volume interest. Nearest significant level to spot at ~2% below. Acts as primary friction zone for pullbacks. Volume/OI ratio suggests active positioning.

MONTHLY_2 holds 79 OI with consistent volume across 0DTE (38 vol), WEEKLY_1 (8 vol), WEEKLY_2 (11 vol). Multi-expiry presence creates structural magnet effect. Second largest OI concentration in dataset.

MONTHLY_2 dominant OI cluster (954 contracts) - represents 85%+ of visible OI. Extremely bullish structural support. Dealers short these calls will hedge by buying on dips, creating strong magnetic pull.
Highest 0DTE volume (271) with additional activity at 6640 (91 vol). Intraday friction zone. Day trading pivot for scalping opportunities. No OI suggests pure speculative flow.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Mixed GEX profile with negative gamma in short-term expiries amplifies directional moves. Reverse smirk skew supports bullish momentum.
outlook.summary: Market displays bullish bias with spot at 25020 testing multi-expiry RESONANCE at 25000. Call walls at 25200-25450 cap immediate upside while 24000 provides structural monthly support. Max Pain at 25800 acts as upside magnet. Elevated PCR (5.11) in MONTHLY_2 indicates extreme pessimism - contrarian bullish signal. Reverse smirk skew in monthly expiries confirms bullish thesis.
